comments.trace: if 'on' calls to bobb.Trace will write to log
comments.logPath: if set, log output will be to this file
comments.maxErrs: if req.ErrLimit is -1, use this as limit
comments.keySuffixWidth: width of zero-padded suffix for keys, see PutRequest.AddKeySuffix
comments.defaultKeyFld: default key field name if not specified in request
